intro: Government, telecommunications, and civil-society sectors were the primary targets in a series of surveillance-focused attacks between April 12 and April 23, 2026. The seven articles covering this tag span the United States, Iran, and Mexico, with a severity mix of two medium, three informational, one critical, and one high. The top vulnerability identified is CVE-2026-22898, carrying a CVSS score of 8.8. The private sector was also among the affected sectors.
